case_title: FREDRICK SILVIA GARDIN DBA THE TRAVEL BUG VS BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,898.29 FILED BY FREDRICK SILVIA GARDIN DBA THE TRAVEL BUG AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-26-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM OCT-26-1992 TO NOV-09-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-10-1992, CONTINUED FROM AUG-10-1992 TO AUG-17-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-17-1992, CONTINUED FROM AUG-17-1992 TO OCT-26-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREDRICK SILVIA GARDIN DBA THE TRAVEL BUG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC. $3,898.29 PRINCIPAL, $93.99 INTEREST, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,021.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-09-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT BOCHOW WALTER DBA CLASCO, INC.
